dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3896 IS: Veterans Affairs Opportunity for Small Businesses Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Blackburn introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To amend title 38, United States Code, to modify the Department of Veterans Affairs procurement hierarchy of small business preferences, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Veterans Affairs Opportunity for Small Businesses Act of 2026.

section.header: Modification of Department of Veterans Affairs procurement hierarchy of small business preferences
section.text: Section 8127(h) of title 38, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: by redesignating paragraph (4) as paragraph (3); and
in paragraph (3), as redesignated by paragraph (2), by inserting established under the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 631 et seq.) before the period at the end.
